title: When Plans Change (A Pink Bear Story)
premise: When snow buries Easter morning, Pink Bear discovers that sometimes the best plans are the ones you have to rebuild together.
character_description: A optimistic stuffed bear with button eyes and soft pink velvet fur, who believes in making things possible even when they seem impossible.
world_description: Susie's bedroom and garden in a New England spring, where indoor and outdoor worlds collide.
style_anchor: Warm 2D picture book style for 'When Plans Change (A Pink Bear Story)'. Soft lighting, rich saturated colours, clean 2D illustrative lines. Character: Pink Bear — A optimistic stuffed bear with button eyes and soft pink velvet fur, who believes in making things possible even when they seem impossible.. World: Susie's bedroom and garden in a New England spring, where indoor and outdoor worlds collide.. Consistent look across all 12 pages.
character_visual_notes: Physical features: Small, well-loved stuffed bear, 10 inches tall, soft dusty rose velvet fur, slightly matted.
Eyes: Two shiny black button eyes, perfectly round, with a perpetually hopeful, wide-eyed expression.
Clothing always worn: None; her soft velvet fur is her only covering.
Signature accessory: A tiny, hand-stitched felt heart, pale lavender, sewn onto her left paw.
Visual signature: Her slightly crooked, optimistic smile, formed by a single embroidered thread.
Physical features: 6-year-old girl, slender build, fair skin with light freckles, long wavy auburn hair.
Eyes: Bright hazel eyes, almond shape, with a gentle, sleepy morning expression.
Clothing always worn: Soft cotton pyjamas: pale buttercup yellow with tiny white polka dots and ruffled cuffs.
Signature accessory: A small, silver locket on a delicate chain, tucked under her pyjama top.
Visual signature: Her hair, often slightly tangled, with a single, loose curl always falling across her forehead.
environment_visual_notes: Season and weather: Early New England spring; crisp, cool air with soft, diffused morning light.
Time period and lighting: Early morning, just after sunrise; gentle, warm golden light filtering through windows.
Dominant colour palette: Soft pastels (robin's egg blue, pale mint, buttercup yellow), warm creams, and natural wood tones.
Architectural/natural style: Cozy, slightly old-fashioned New England cottage; rambling garden with budding trees and early spring flowers.
Signature environmental detail: A small, cheerful robin perched on a window sill or garden branch in every scene.
